/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MocapServer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MocapServer.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/server/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MocapServer.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/server/src/orchestrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MocapServer.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/server/src/processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MocapServer.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/server/src/receiver.cpp.o -o MocapServer  -lzmq /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.15.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.10.1.0
